race.description: H & M Cope Appreciation Race Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: GAMP (4) frustrating mare who comes here in peak condition third-up. Sat on the fast tempo and never surrendered with a close-up third to Revolutionary Star over 1100m at Gosford. Kept fresh and no excuses with the fitness edge. NICOLOSI (7) Ole Kirk filly from the good producing mare and Group 1 winner Aloha on debut for the Waterhouse & Bott yard. Has impressed in the last three trials and is expected to figure prominently. MERINI (6) Written Tycoon filly who comes across from New Zealand and is now in the Kris Lees yard. Resumed with a gritty second over 1150m at Te Aroha on February 11. Primed with the two trials and sure to be thereabouts. SORENTINA (8) warmed up late on debut with an even fourth over 1000m at Canberra. Improver who will be doing her best work late.
